snippet.title: Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer | Pawan Kalyan | Harish Shankar | Sreeleela | Raashii Khanna
snippet.description:
Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer on Mythri Movie Makers. 

Ustaad Bhagat Singh is an Upcoming Telugu movie ft. Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna & others. Music composed by Rockstar Devi Sri Prasad, Written and Directed by Harish Shankar.S. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers Banner.

In Cinemas March 19th, 2026.

#UstaadBhagatSinghTrailer #UstaadBhagatSingh #PawanKalyan #HarishShankar #Sreeleela #RaashiiKhanna #DeviSriPrasad #DSP #NaveenYerneni #RaviShankar #MythriMovieMakers

Cast & Crew Details :

Cast: Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna, Parthiban & Others

Technical Crew:
Written & Directed by: Harish Shankar.S
Producers: Naveen Yerneni, Ravi Shankar Yalamanchili
Music: Devi Sri Prasad
Background Score: Thaman S
Screenplay: K Dasharath, Ramesh Reddy
Additional writing: Praveen Varma and Chandramohan.
Editing: Karthika Srinivas 
Production Designer: Anand Sai 
CEO: Cherry

Fights : Ram Laxman, Nabakanth, Prudhvi 
Costume Designer(Pawan Kalyan): Neeta Lulla
DI & Sound Mix: Annapurna Studios
Mix Engineer: Kannan Ganpat
Colorist: Venu Gopal Rao J
Marketing: First show
PRO: Venu Gopal

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | SEMI FINALS | Day 3 #BGMILIVE #BGIS
snippet.description:
The SEMI FINALS of BGIS 2026 begin.

The competition tightens. The stakes rise. There is no margin for error now.

After battling through The Grind, Round stages, Quarter Finals and Wildcard, only the strongest remain. Every match carries weight. Every fight moves teams one step closer to the Grand Finals.

This is where contenders turn into finalists.

Watch the SEMI FINALS live and witness who takes the next step toward the championship stage.

Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

ŪēúÍĶ≠žóźžĄú ÍĪīŽĄąÍįĄ ž≤≠ŽÖĄŽď§žĚė žč§ž†ú Ž™©žÜĆŽ¶¨ÍįÄ ŽčīÍłī žó≠žā¨ž†Ā ÍłįŽ°ĚÍ≥ľ žĶúžīąžĚė žēĄŽ¶¨ŽěĎ ŽÖĻžĚĆžĚīŽĚľŽäĒ Ž¨łŪôĒž†Ā žĚėŽĮłŽ•ľ Ž™®ŪčįŽłĆŽ°ú žāľžēĄ ŪėĄŽĆÄž†Ā žÉĀžÉĀŽ†•žóź ÍłįŽįėŪēėžó¨ žě¨ÍĶ¨žĄĪ ŽįŹ žįĹžěĎŽźú Í≤ÉžúľŽ°ú, žč§ž†úžôÄ Žč§Ž•ľ žąė žěąžúľŽ©į žó≠žā¨ž†Ā žā¨ÍĪīžĚīŽāė žĚłŽ¨ľžóź ŽĆÄŪēú ŪŹČÍįÄ¬∑ŪēīžĄĚÍ≥ľŽäĒ Ž¨īÍīÄŪē®žĚĄ ŽįĚŪěôŽčąŽč§.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (‚ÄúSeven Koreans at Howard‚ÄĚ), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of ‚ÄúArirang.‚ÄĚ This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

snippet.title: Main Vaapas Aaunga | Official Teaser | Imtiaz Ali, A. R. Rahman, Diljit, Vedang, Sharvari, Naseer
snippet.description:
In Imtiaz Ali‚Äôs world, love is never just a feeling. It is a journey that lingers in stolen glances, unfinished conversations and memories that refuse to fade away. MAIN VAAPAS AAUNGA  is one such journey - a story of love and longing.

A Film by Imtiaz Ali

Starring: Diljit Dosanjh, Naseeruddin Shah, Vedang Raina, Sharvari
Music Composed, Produced, and Arranged by: A. R. Rahman 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Written by Imtiaz Ali, Nayanika Mahtani
Director Of Photography: Sylvester Fonseca, ISC
Production Designer: Suman Roy Mahapatra
Editor: Aarti Bajaj
Sound Designer & Production Sound Mixer: Dhiman Karmakar
Costume Designer: Sheetal Iqbal Sharma
Look Designer: Soamaa Goswami
Re-recording Mixer: Alok De
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Associate Director: Suraj Paraswani
First Assistant Director: Adrian Fernandes
Post Producer: Chinmay Ogale
Publicity Design: (H-One) Rahul Nanda, Himanshu Nanda
Visual Effects: Phantom FX
Color: Redchillies.color
Visual Promotions: MA+TH
Digital Promotions: The Small Big Idea
Public Relations: Universal Communications
CMO & Head of Syndication: Sameer Chopra
WSF Marketing: Nidhi Sethia, Gautam Ahuja, Anushka Arora
Applause Marketing: Devnidhi Bajoria
Supervising Producer (Applause): Sneha Vashist
Co Producers: Sunil Chainani, Prasoon Garg
Executive Producers: Vishal Bajaj, Pratik Nandkumar More
Produced by Sameer Nair, Deepak Segal
Produced by Window Seat Films, Mohit Choudhary, Shibhasish Sarkar
Music on Tips

Main Vaapas Aaunga, Releasing on 12th June 2026 in theatres near you.

#MainVaapasAaunga #ImitiazAli #DiljitDosanjh #NaseeruddinShah #VedangRaina #SharvariWagh #Teaser #LoveStory #ApplauseEntertainment

Applause Entertainment, a part of the Aditya Birla Group, is renowned for producing premium drama series, films, documentaries, and animation. en.title: Main Vaapas Aaunga | Official Teaser | Imtiaz Ali, A. R. Rahman, Diljit, Vedang, Sharvari, Naseer
en.description:
In Imtiaz Ali‚Äôs world, love is never just a feeling. It is a journey that lingers in stolen glances, unfinished conversations and memories that refuse to fade away. MAIN VAAPAS AAUNGA  is one such journey - a story of love and longing.

A Film by Imtiaz Ali

id.description:
Dalam dunia Imtiaz Ali, cinta bukanlah sekadar perasaan. Ia adalah sebuah perjalanan yang terukir dalam tatapan curi-curi, percakapan yang tak tuntas, dan kenangan yang tak mau pudar. MAIN VAAPAS AAUNGA adalah salah satu perjalanan tersebut - sebuah kisah tentang cinta dan kerinduan.

ŗīáŗīāŗī§ŗīŅŗīĮŗīĺŗīłŗĶć ŗīÖŗī≤ŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĀŗīüŗĶÜ ŗī≤ŗĶčŗīēŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶć, ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗī£ŗīĮŗīā ŗīíŗīįŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗī≤ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīĶŗĶÜŗīĪŗĶĀŗīģŗĶäŗīįŗĶĀ ŗīĶŗīŅŗīēŗīĺŗīįŗīģŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤. ŗīģŗĶčŗī∑ŗĶćŗīüŗīŅŗīöŗĶćŗīö ŗī®ŗĶčŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī≥ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶĀŗīā, ŗī™ŗĶāŗĶľŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗīĮŗīĺŗīēŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ ŗīłŗīāŗī≠ŗīĺŗī∑ŗī£ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī≥ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶĀŗīā, ŗīģŗīĺŗīěŗĶćŗīěŗĶĀŗī™ŗĶčŗīēŗīĺŗĶĽ ŗīĶŗīŅŗīłŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗī§ŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī® ŗīďŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīēŗī≥ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶĀŗīā ŗī§ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗīŅŗī®ŗīŅŗĶĹŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī® ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀ ŗīĮŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗīįŗīĮŗīĺŗī£ŗīŅŗī§ŗĶć. ŗīģŗĶÜŗīĮŗīŅŗĶĽ ŗīĶŗīĺŗī™ŗīĺŗīłŗĶć ŗīÜŗīĶŗĶĀŗīôŗĶćŗīē ŗīÖŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīįŗīģŗĶäŗīįŗĶĀ ŗīĮŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗīįŗīĮŗīĺŗī£ŗĶć - ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗī£ŗīĮŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶćŗīĪŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā ŗīĶŗīĺŗīěŗĶć‚ÄĆŗīõŗīĮŗĶĀŗīüŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā ŗīēŗī•.

ŗī≤ŗĶĀŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶć ŗī°ŗīŅŗīłŗĶąŗī®ŗĶľ: ŗīłŗĶčŗīģ ŗīóŗĶčŗīłŗĶćŗīĶŗīĺŗīģŗīŅ
ŗīĪŗĶÄ-ŗīĪŗĶÜŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶčŗĶľŗī°ŗīŅŗīāŗīóŗĶć ŗīģŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīłŗĶľ: ŗīÖŗī≤ŗĶčŗīēŗĶć ŗī°ŗĶÜ

ŗīÜŗī¶ŗĶćŗīĮ ŗīÖŗīłŗīŅŗīłŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗī®ŗĶćŗīĪŗĶć ŗī°ŗīĮŗīĪŗīēŗĶćŗīüŗĶľ: ŗīÖŗī°ŗĶćŗīįŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĽ ŗīęŗĶÜŗĶľŗī£ŗīĺŗī£ŗĶćŗīüŗīłŗĶć

WSF ŗīģŗīĺŗĶľŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīŅŗīāŗīóŗĶć: ŗī®ŗīŅŗīßŗīŅ ŗīłŗĶáŗī§ŗīŅŗīĮ, ŗīóŗĶóŗī§ŗīā ŗīÖŗīĻŗĶāŗīú, ŗīÖŗī®ŗĶĀŗī∑ŗĶćŗīē ŗīÖŗīĪŗĶčŗīĪ

ŗīłŗīĻŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīĺŗī§ŗīĺŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĺ: ŗīłŗĶĀŗī®ŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗīöŗĶąŗī®ŗīĺŗī®ŗīŅ, ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗīłŗĶāŗĶļ ŗīóŗīĺŗĶľŗīóŗĶć
ŗīéŗīēŗĶćŗīłŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīĮŗĶāŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗĶÄŗīĶŗĶć ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗĶäŗī°ŗĶćŗīĮŗĶāŗīłŗĶľŗīģŗīĺŗĶľ: ŗīĶŗīŅŗī∂ŗīĺŗĶĹ ŗī¨ŗīúŗīĺŗīúŗĶć, ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗī§ŗĶÄŗīēŗĶć ŗī®ŗī®ŗĶćŗī¶ŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗīģŗīĺŗĶľ ŗīģŗĶčŗĶľ
ŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīĺŗī§ŗīĺŗīĶŗĶć: ŗīłŗīģŗĶÄŗĶľ ŗī®ŗīĺŗīĮŗĶľ, ŗī¶ŗĶÄŗī™ŗīēŗĶć ŗīłŗĶÜŗīóŗīĺŗĶĺ
ŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīĺŗī§ŗīĺŗīĶŗĶć: ŗīĶŗīŅŗĶĽŗī°ŗĶč ŗīłŗĶÄŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶć ŗīęŗīŅŗī≤ŗīŅŗīāŗīłŗĶć, ŗīģŗĶčŗīĻŗīŅŗī§ŗĶć ŗīöŗĶóŗīßŗīįŗīŅ, ŗī∂ŗīŅŗī≠ŗīĺŗī∑ŗīŅŗī∑ŗĶć ŗīłŗĶľŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗīĺŗĶľ

ŗīģŗĶÜŗīĮŗīŅŗĶĽ ŗīĶŗīĺŗī™ŗīłŗĶć ŗīÜŗīĶŗĶĀŗīôŗĶćŗīē, 2026 ŗīúŗĶāŗĶļ 12-ŗī®ŗĶć ŗī®ŗīŅŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīüŗĶÜ ŗīÖŗīüŗĶĀŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶĀŗī≥ŗĶćŗī≥ ŗī§ŗīŅŗīĮŗĶáŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīĪŗĶĀŗīēŗī≥ŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗīĪŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶÄŗīłŗĶć ŗīöŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶćŗīĮŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶĀ.

snippet.description:

Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Produced by Jyoti Deshpande

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla Teaser REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bhooth Bangla Teaser Review By Deeksha Sharma. Akshay Kumar with Director Priyadarshan is set for Bhooth Bangla Franchise with Tabu & Wamiqa Gabbi in Mysterious Roles of Horror Comedy & Suspense- Bhooth Bangla Teaser is pure Nostalgia of Bhool Bhulaiyaa but falls short in editing & establishing connection of Old Characters in new story. Bhooth Bangla Teaser Trailer Reaction & Full Movie Expectation would be shared in this Video. Can Akshay Kumar challenge Kartik Aaryan for OG Horror Comedy Franchise? Do leave Comments below now!

#BhoothBangla #BhoothBanglaTeaser #BhoothBanglaTeaserReview

snippet.title: Mantra Muugdha | Official Teaser | Anupam Patnaik|Sanoj,Manmay, Sarthak,Bhoomika,Suryamayee,Dipanwit
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Teaser of the most anticipated movie of the year - ‚ÄúMantra Muugdha‚ÄĚ

Get ready to be spellbound in Anupam Patnaik‚Äôs magical and maddening cinematic journey, where mystery, music, laughter and the supernatural collide.

A story that will haunt you‚Ä¶ thrill you‚Ä¶ and leave you mesmerised.

The spell begins now !!

ŗī§ŗīģŗīŅŗīīŗĶć ŗīöŗīŅŗī§ŗĶćŗīįŗīģŗīĺŗīĮ ŗīģŗĶāŗĶļŗīĶŗīĺŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶÜ ŗīäŗĶľŗīúŗĶćŗīúŗīłŗĶćŗīĶŗī≤ŗīĶŗĶĀŗīā ŗīŹŗīĪŗĶÜ ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗī§ŗĶÄŗīēŗĶćŗī∑ŗīĮŗĶčŗīüŗĶÜ ŗīēŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗīįŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗĶĀŗīģŗīĺŗīĮ ŗīģŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗīĪŗĶÄŗī® ŗīĶŗĶÄŗī°ŗīŅŗīĮŗĶč ŗīóŗīĺŗī®ŗīā. ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗī≠ŗĶĀŗī¶ŗĶáŗīĶŗīĮŗĶĀŗīüŗĶÜ ŗīĻŗĶą ŗīéŗī®ŗĶľŗīúŗīŅ ŗīęŗīĺŗīłŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶć ŗī°ŗīĺŗĶĽŗīłŗĶć ŗī®ŗī∑ŗĶćŗīüŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗĶÜŗīüŗĶĀŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīįŗĶĀŗī§ŗĶć. ŗīé ŗīÜŗĶľ ŗīĪŗīĻŗĶćŗīģŗīĺŗī®ŗĶćŗīĪŗĶÜ ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀ ŗīóŗīĺŗī®ŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶćŗīĪŗĶÜ ŗī¨ŗīĺŗīāŗīóŗĶľ. ŗī∂ŗīįŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗīā ŗīÖŗī§ŗīŅŗī∂ŗīĮŗīŅŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī® ŗī®ŗĶÉŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīĶŗĶĀŗīā ŗīłŗīāŗīóŗĶÄŗī§ŗīĶŗĶĀŗīā. 

ŗīłŗīŅŗī®ŗīŅŗīģ: ŗīģŗĶāŗĶļŗīĶŗīĺŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶć
ŗīóŗīĺŗī®ŗīā: ŗīģŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗīĪŗĶÄŗī®
ŗīłŗīāŗīóŗĶÄŗī§ŗīĶŗĶĀŗīā ŗīóŗīĺŗīĮŗīēŗī®ŗĶĀŗīā: ŗīé ŗīÜŗĶľ ŗīĪŗīĻŗĶćŗīģŗīĺŗĶĽ
ŗīÖŗī≠ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶáŗī§ŗīĺŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĺ: ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗī≠ŗĶĀŗī¶ŗĶáŗīĶ

ŗīłŗīāŗīóŗĶÄŗī§ ŗī≤ŗĶáŗī¨ŗĶĹ: ŗī≤ŗīĻŗīĺŗīįŗīŅ ŗīģŗĶćŗīĮŗĶāŗīłŗīŅŗīēŗĶć
ŗīēŗĶčŗīĪŗīłŗĶć: ŗī∂ŗīįŗī§ŗĶć ŗīłŗī®ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶčŗī∑ŗĶć, ŗī∂ŗĶćŗīįŗĶÄŗīßŗĶľ ŗīįŗīģŗĶáŗī∂ŗĶć, ŗī®ŗīĺŗīįŗīĺŗīĮŗī£ŗĶĽ, ŗīłŗĶóŗī®ŗĶćŗī¶ŗīįŗĶćŗīĮ, ŗīÖŗī™ŗĶľŗī£ ŗīĻŗīįŗīŅŗīēŗĶĀŗīģŗīĺŗĶľ, ŗīÖŗī≤ŗīēŗĶć‚ÄĆŗīłŗīĺŗī£ŗĶćŗīüŗĶćŗīį ŗīúŗĶčŗīĮŗĶć

ŗīģŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗīĪŗĶÄŗī® ŗīĶŗĶÄŗī°ŗīŅŗīĮŗĶč ŗīóŗīĺŗī®ŗīā | ŗīģŗĶāŗĶļŗīĶŗīĺŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶć ŗīóŗīĺŗī®ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ | ŗīé ŗīÜŗĶľ ŗīĪŗīĻŗĶćŗīģŗīĺŗĶĽ ŗīóŗīĺŗī®ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ | ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗī≠ŗĶĀŗī¶ŗĶáŗīĶ ŗī®ŗĶÉŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīā | ŗīŹŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīĶŗĶĀŗīā ŗī™ŗĶĀŗī§ŗīŅŗīĮ ŗī§ŗīģŗīŅŗīīŗĶć ŗīĶŗĶÄŗī°ŗīŅŗīĮŗĶč ŗīóŗīĺŗī®ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ | ŗī§ŗīģŗīŅŗīīŗĶć ŗīóŗīĺŗī®ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ 2026 | ŗīģŗĶāŗĶļŗīĶŗīĺŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶć ŗīłŗīŅŗī®ŗīŅŗīģŗīĺ ŗīóŗīĺŗī®ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ | ŗī§ŗīģŗīŅŗīīŗĶć ŗī®ŗĶÉŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ ŗīóŗīĺŗī®ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ | ŗīé ŗīÜŗĶľ ŗīÜŗĶľ ŗī§ŗīģŗīŅŗīīŗĶć ŗīóŗīĺŗī®ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ | ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗī≠ŗĶĀŗī¶ŗĶáŗīĶ ŗī®ŗĶÉŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ ŗīóŗīĺŗī®ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ | ŗī®ŗĶÉŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗīłŗĶćŗī•ŗīĺŗī®ŗīā | ŗī®ŗĶÉŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ ŗīĶŗĶÜŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤ŗĶĀŗīĶŗīŅŗī≥ŗīŅ | ŗīłŗĶóŗīĻŗĶÉŗī¶ ŗīóŗīĺŗī®ŗīā

snippet.title: Zihaal e Miskin (Video) Vishal Mishra, Shreya Ghoshal|Rohit Zinjurke, Nimrit Ahluwalia|Javed-Mohsin
snippet.description:
Presenting the official video of Zihaal e Miskin - the heartbreak song of the season. Featuring Rohit Zinjurke and Nimrit Ahluwalia, this melody has been sung by Vishal Mishra & Shreya Ghoshal, music by Javed-Mohsin And lyrics by Kunaal Vermaa.

#ZihaaleMiskin #RohitZinjurke #NimritKaurAhluwalia  

Create reels on Zihaal e Miskin : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/605950694837426/

ūüéß Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/track/51DEaelXeJJ6cFFYbX8Hal 
ūüéß JioSaavn : https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/zihaal-e-miskin/OQAgUxlXTmM
ūüéß Wynk Music : https://wynk.in/u/W7uyGgqk2

ūüéß  Audio Credits

‚ěü Viola‚Äôs Played by : Sushil Varma ,Sanjay Varma ,Dharmendra jawda ,Jitendra jawda ,Mohan Goyal ,Chander Makwana, Prabhat Kishore ,Sandeep Thakur.

snippet.title: Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
What makes two people soulmates? From the Executive Producers of Stranger Things, and the Director of Baby Reindeer, Camila Morrone and Adam DiMarco star in SOMETHING VERY BAD IS GOING TO HAPPEN, coming to Netflix March 26th.

snippet.title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren‚Äôt alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to ‚Ä¶ Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar¬ģ nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O‚ÄôConnor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar¬ģ winner Colin Firth (The King‚Äôs Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar¬ģ nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025‚Äôs Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award¬ģ nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry‚Äôs most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award¬ģ winner, including Oscars¬ģ for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler‚Äôs List, which received a total of seven Oscars¬ģ, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award¬ģ nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

snippet.title: Bhishmar Official Trailer | East Coast Vijayan | Dhyan Sreenivasan| Vishnu Unnikrishnan|Divya Pillai
snippet.description:
Presenting the Trailer of the upcoming Malayalam-language feature film Bhishmar, directed by East Coast Vijayan under the banner of East Coast Communications Pvt. Ltd. The film stars Dhyan Sreenivasan, Vishnu Unnikrishnan, Divya Pillai, Ammayraa Goswami, Indrans, Unni Lalu, Shaju Sreedhar, Akhil Kavalayoor, Senthil Krishna, Jibin Gopinath, Vineeth Tattil, Santhosh Keezhattoor, Binu Thrikkakkara, Manikandan Achari, Abu Salim, Jayan Cherthala, Sohan Seenulal, Vishnu Groovy, Sreeraj, and Shiny Vijayan.

snippet.title: Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse Kannada Song  | KD | Nora Fatehi | Dhruva Sarja | Prems | AJ | KVN
snippet.description:
Presenting The Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse Lyrical Song From The Movie KD-The Devil Starring: Dhruva Sarja, Reeshma Nanaiah, Shilpa Shetty & Others Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Official Youtube Channel..!!! 
----------------------------------------------
#KD #KDTHEDEVIL #sarseninnaseragasarse #norafatehi #prems  #aishwaryarangarajan #rajusundaram  #KVNProductions #jogiprem #kannadanewsong  #kdmoviesong #kannadamoviesongs #reeshmananaiah #dhruvasarja #trending #prems #dance #newsong #hindisong #jogiprem #kdthirdsingle #kdsong #arjunjanya #shilpashetty #ramesharavind #telugu #shivashiva #vravichandran #showmanprem #youtube #anandaudio 
--------------------------------
Lyrics:
Hey‚Ä¶ Mai Mele Seere Nilluthilla Yaakoo..
Hey‚Ä¶ Nerige Hididu Nillisonu Beku‚Ä¶
Seragyaako‚Ä¶. Jaarutthide‚Ä¶..
Sarasakke Seerenu Sariyutthayide‚Ä¶.
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
..................‚Ä¶ Khalnayak Hoon Main..

Melatthi Kelage Ilsi, Thottikkadang Olage Ilsi
Olag Hogi Horage Bandre Khaali.. Ellaa Khaali Khaali
Maimyaalanthru Challabyadrappa Bejaaraytthade‚Ä¶
Maneg Hodre Nimma Guttu Rattaagoythade‚Ä¶

Ille Nekkendu Hogbudi, Ille Orsbudi
Kaiyal Baatlanthu Manevargo Thakkond Hogbedi..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
.................‚Ä¶ Khalnayak Hoon Main..

Meese Hotthorigella, Naanond Queshion Kel.la
Maneli Ella Idru Yaake‚Ä¶ Nimge Nande Beke‚Ä¶
Thumba Costly Antha Bejaar Maadkobedrappa..
Aladhu Thoogi Thooka Haaki Nodi Kodrappa..

Mettha Metthagirthade Mutthindange Sorthade
Baayigitre Uppina Kaayi Becchagaaythade..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
........................... Khalnayak Hoon Main..

snippet.title: Sanam Teri Kasam - 8K/4K Music Video | Harshvardhan Rane | Himesh Reshammiya | Ankit Tiwari, Palak M
snippet.description:
Relive the timeless romance with the stunning 8K/4K music video of "Sanam Teri Kasam" from the movie Sanam Teri Kasam. Featuring the heartfelt chemistry of Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane, this soulful track is beautifully composed by Himesh Reshammiya and sung by Ankit Tiwari and Palak Muchhal.

#sanamterikasam #8k #8kvideo #harshvardhanrane #mawrahocane #ankittiwari #palakmuchhal #himeshreshammiya 

Description:
Song - Sanam Teri Kasam
Singer - Ankit Tiwari, Palak Muchhal
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Sameer Anjaan

Lyrics:
Betahasha dil ne
Tujhko hi chaaha hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati namm
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Huaa ye kya hashar mera
Judaa huaa sabar mera
Main tere bin ek lamha
Kyun kabhi naa jiya

Raat bhar ashqo ne tujhko pukara hai
Har dua main maine tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam...

Nasha tera dil ko lagaa
Dena nahi mujhko dagaa
Main teri aadat ka maara
Hai kya meri khataa

Tere bin naamumkin
Apna guzaara hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aakhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Stream/Download ~

~ Music INFO ~
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10


~ Follow Banjaare ~ 
https://www.instagram.com/official_banjaare?igsh=eWd5MGIwbXpscThk&utm_source=qr

Lyrics ~ Banjaare - Bairan
Manne saambh-saambh raakhe
Tere jhanjhraa ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi
Chhori bawle se hore

Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere
Khaaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen konya deti
Haaye...
Bairi tanhaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Ho...
Maarya-maarya phire
Dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi
Ke jeena banjaare ka

Khoya rahun yaad teri
Kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batuwe mein rakhun teri
Saambh ke nishaaniyaan

Tere bina kaal horeya
Theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram dede
Saansa te rihaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai re

Je tu thodi ghabra jya
Meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re main
Aa jaaunga

Todun duniya ki reet
Re ke haar re ke jeet
Manne chahiye teri preet
Main nibha jaaunga

Dekh bawla bana gi
Manne likhna sikha gi
Haaye... noch-noch khaagi
Teri bairan judaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai re

Aaj taai nibhaun jo si
Kasam thi khaai manne
Zindagi saari ya meri
Tere lekhe laai manne

snippet.description:
Granny Live! Intense ūüĒ•Escape Room Gameplay || Granny Jumpscares! ||granny legacy #granny #live 


#granny#ive 
#grannygameplay 
#granny1 
#granny2 
#granny3 
#shortsfeed 

Join me for a heart-pounding live playthrough of the infamous horror game, Granny! I'm attempting to escape her house for the very first time, and the tension is REAL.
Watch my complete, unedited attempt to solve the puzzles and find the keys to escape before Granny gets me. This gameplay captures every mistake, every close call, and every loud scream.
If you enjoy horror gameplay and funny reactions, don't forget to like and subscribe!

snippet.title: PRX vs. G2 ‚ÄĒ VALORANT Masters Santiago ‚ÄĒ Playoffs Stage
snippet.description:
From February 28th to March 15th, the world‚Äôs top VALORANT teams will battle at Masters Santiago, the first global event of the 2026 VALORANT Champions Tour. Twelve teams qualified through Stage 1 tournaments of their respective regional leagues, will compete for Championship Points and a chance to advance toward Champions Shanghai.

We‚Äôre proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: AWS, Coinbase, EWC, Globant, HyperX, Mastercard, OMEN, Red Bull, Secretlab, and Verizon.

Make sure to follow the official VALORANT Esports social channels for additional information:

snippet.description:
Madhuri Dixit 90's Song : Palki Mein Hoke Sawar Chali Re - Khal Nayak | Alka Yagnik | Evergreen Song


#madhuridixit #alkayagnik #90severgreen #khalnayak #hindisong #bollywoodsongs 

Song Credits :
Song: Palki Mein Hoke Sawar Chali Re
Singer(s): Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi

Movie Cast & Crew:
Movie Name : Khal Nayak (1993)
Producer: Subhash Ghai
Director: Subhash Ghai
Cast: Sanjay Dutt, Jackie Shroff, Madhuri Dixit, Raakhee, Anupam Kher

Lyrics:

Koi Rok Sake To Rok Le Main Naachati
Chhan Chhan Chhan Chhan Chhan

Paalki Mein Hoke Sawar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re
Paalki Mein Hoke Savaar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

Koi Rok Sake To Rok Le Main Naachati
Chhan Chhan Chhan Chhan Chhan

Paalki Mein Hoke Savaar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

Mushkil Se Maine Ye Din Nikaale
Mushkil Se Maine Ye Din Nikaale
Chalte Tez Chal Tu O Gaadi Waale

Mann Mein Lagi Hai Aisi Lagan
Aisi Lagan Haaye Aisi Lagan

Hoke Main Badi Bekaraar Chali Re
Hoke Main Badi Bekaraar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re
Paalki Mein Hoke Savaar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

Ho Jaaungi Main Jal Jal Ke Mitti
Maine Piya Ko Likh Di Hai Chitthi
Maine Piya Ko Likh Di Hai Chitthi

Tu Na Aa Tu Na Aa Main Aa Rahi Hoon
Sajan Sajan Sajan

Kar Kar Ke Main Intezaar Chali Re
Kar Kar Ke Main Intezaar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re
Paalki Mein Hoke Savaar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

Ye Sona Ye Chaandi Ye Heere Ye Moti
Ho Sainya Bina Sainya Bina Sab Kuch Hai
Naam Ka, Naam Ka, Naam Ka
Naam Ka, Naam Ka

Ye Mera Joban Joban Joban
Ye Mera Joban Kis Kaam Ka, Kis Kaam Ka
Ghoonghat Mein Jale
Kab Tak Birahan, Birahan, Birahan, Birahan

Main Sir Se Chunari Utaar Chali Re
Main Sir Se Chunari Utaar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

Chhan Chhan Chhan Chhan Chhan
